markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

User requested comprehensive research for luxury interior spa/jacuzzi up to 180x180cm with powerful massage jets, premium materials like teak, and Swiss delivery. Initial research covered only 11 models but user demanded minimum 100 models focused on high-end design. Session ended with server error during expanded research attempt.


## Context & Intent

Finding luxury spa/bathtub for interior installation with specific size, material, and jet requirements


## What Was Done

Initial analysis of 11 luxury spa/bathtub models with detailed specifications comparison


## Outputs Produced

- [comparative_analysis] Spa/Bathtub Comparison Table — Excel format analysis of 11 models with specifications, pricing, and features
- [text_file] Specifications Summary — Text format compilation of research findings

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Focus on spas over bathtubs as requested
- Include only models meeting 180x180cm size constraint
- Verify Swiss delivery availability for all models

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Structured comparison format
- Focus on premium materials and powerful jets
Failed / suboptimal:

- Only analyzed 11 models instead of requested 100+
- Insufficient scope for comprehensive market analysis
Discoveries:

- High-end models available with up to 75 jets
- Premium materials like teak and Nordic wood available

## Challenges & Blockers

- Server error during expanded research
- Insufficient initial scope (11 vs 100+ models)
- Task cancellation before completion

## Open Questions

- Which specific design aesthetic preferred?
- Budget range for luxury models?
- Installation requirements and constraints?

## Next Steps

- Conduct expanded research of 100+ models
- Focus on high-end design manufacturers
- Complete comprehensive comparison analysis
